non_emergency_routing_rules: Log details and inform caller of a next-business-day callback.

call_transfer_rules.what_to_say_if_fails: I apologize, but all our technicians are currently assisting other customers. I have flagged this as urgent and dispatch will call you back within 15 minutes.

integration_constraints: Do not log residential lighting quotes into ServiceTrade.
after_hours_flow_summary: Confirm emergency. Collect name, number, address. Attempt transfer to Phone Tree. If fail, transfer to Dispatch.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet, ask purpose, transfer to office line. Fallback to voicemail script.
notes: Onboarding completed. Timezone and fallback protocols finalized.
